steps.title: Locate the y-intercept
steps.content:
The y‑intercept occurs where $$x=0$$.
Reading the graph, the curve passes through the point $$(0,5)$$

steps.title: Determine y and select the choice
steps.content:
Thus the y‑intercept value is $$y=5$$.
The answer is 5.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $5$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $5$.
